description: Captain Data is a B2B data and automation platform with a unified API for enriching leads, pulling intent signals, and powering sales workflows at scale.
overview: Captain Data gives sales and RevOps teams a unified API to enrich leads and companies, capture intent signals, and automate prospecting workflows at scale.
what_is: Captain Data is a data and automation platform for sales and revenue operations. It exposes a single API to find and enrich leads, companies, and signals, so teams can pull high-quality B2B data into their systems without managing many separate integrations.

It is most useful for automating prospecting workflows, enriching buyer profiles, and detecting engagement signals at scale, including powering AI sales tools. Teams typically wire it into their go-to-market processes within days to feed real-time data downstream.

Captain Data complements CRMs and email systems by supplying clean profile and intent data and automating the steps around it. It is a data and workflow layer rather than a direct engagement platform or CRM.
